    <ows:Exception exceptionCode="RasdamanRequestFailed" >
        <ows:ExceptionText>Error querying rasdaman with rasql 'Select sdom(clip( c, LINESTRING(31472 33 16,31472 33 16) ))  FROM DWD_5min_4326 AS c'. Reason: std::bad_array_new_length</ows:ExceptionText>
